criteria.label: State RMSE and MAE formulas and compute both on a small held-out example.
Explain the difference between MSE/MAE as training losses and RMSE/MAE as evaluation metrics.
criteria.example: Train with MSELoss on train split (Loss Functions); report test RMSE=√(test MSE) on test split — same formula family, different split and purpose.

criteria.label: Compare RMSE and MAE for the same model and explain when they disagree on ranking.
criteria.example: Model A: MAE=2, RMSE=6. Model B: MAE=2.5, RMSE=4. MAE favors A; RMSE favors B — B has fewer large tail errors.

criteria.label: Compute test RMSE with sklearn after a train/test split and compare to a mean baseline.
criteria.example: LinearRegression on train; root_mean_squared_error(y_test, y_pred) vs root_mean_squared_error(y_test, np.full_like(y_test, y_train.mean())).
